rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings
Component type contracts should reference ports only through valid variables or outputs, not subcomponent ports directly
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by placing AGREE annexes in appropriate scopes based on whether they reference component types or implementations
Do not reference AADL properties like Compute_Execution_Time or unit tokens directly in AGREE expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Implementation-level bindings must be placed after relevant subcomponents and connections in implementation scopes
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Do not encode event ports as numeric or Boolean values without explicit data representation in the model
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
AADL property associations as AGREE variables
